_comment: Hand-authored additions to the auto-generated v12.1_to_v12 profile (the thin corpus misses types real projects use). v12.1 introduced HBO primitive code 22 (128-bit channel masks) -> narrow to code 12 for all older versions (primitive_retype, blanket over every code-22). Single-channel 'channelType' fields became enum indices (code 9) in v12.1 and must become bitmask 1<<n (code 21) for older versions; DataChannel.type is auto-detected, DataProceduralInput.channelType is corpus-absent so added here. field_rekind: the base profile rekinds DataActionPaint.sourceTransparent object->array (v12.1 stores a single source object; v12-and-older expect an array). DataActionEraser and DataActionSmudge have the identical sourceTransparent member but the corpus lacked them, so the base missed them -- leaving an object where v8.1's loader reads an array crashes it (null deref). Same boundary, same family.
